rationale: Surface shape is CWE-476 null-deref on `p = kstrdup(s, 0); use_string(p);`. The project's idiom is to never NULL-check kstrdup (0 of 5 sites check). Axis-5 `variant_ratio(kstrdup)` returns (0, 5) — uniform unchecked pattern, NOT an asymmetric anomaly. Axis-3 (unchecked_alloc_local) still verdicts EXPLOITABLE — any unchecked kstrdup IS a real bug regardless of project idiom (a project-wide idiom of `not handling OOM` is a project-wide bug class, not a project-wide invariant). Axis-5 must not fabricate extra signal from the uniform pattern; this fixture tests that. Crafted, not a real CVE.

lifecycle_precondition.notes: Crafted CWE-476 uniform variant — even though project idiom doesn't check, the lifecycle precondition is the same.
